page-reports-description: Research about Ethereum from financial analysts, technical auditors, regulators, development teams, and policy groups. Each card links to the publisher's original report.
page-reports-intro: Use these reports to learn how institutions describe Ethereum: how it works, what it is used for, and how it fits into the wider financial system. Each one is published by a named institution and links out to the publisher's own site.
page-reports-suggest-body: Know an institutional report about Ethereum that should be listed here? Open an issue with the title, publisher, date, and link.
